message:
fix(codegen/runtime): Fix keyword escaping and mutation detection

- from_imports.zig: Use emitDottedIdent() for module names to properly
  escape Zig keywords like 'test' in dotted paths (test.support.X)
- zig_keywords.zig: Add c_longdouble to keyword list to prevent
  shadowing Zig primitive type
- builtins.zig: Add bytes_factory, bytearray_factory, memoryview_factory
  exports for type constructor mappings
- var_hoisting.zig: Fix mutation detection to check scoped keys (e.g.
  "msg:0") in addition to bare variable names, fixing const/var
  declaration for variables assigned in if/else branches
- support.zig: Improve UnraisableExceptionContext with proper hook
  callback registration
